sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105122" key="tripe/mpelos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρι-πέμπελος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105122.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">childish from age,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1071c</biblScope> </bibl>: cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πέμπελος.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
